jsonLd.title: Porter is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Porter invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Porter:
Porter is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Porter!
